name: Belgium Town Park
description: Belgium Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Charles, IL. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Big Rock Park District
description: Big Rock Park District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Big Rock, IL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Big Woods Park
description: Come play pickleball at Big Woods Park in Batavia, IL! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include water. The courts are free.

name: Centre of Elgin
description: Centre of Elgin is a place to play pickleball in Elgin, IL. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees:
Fee required — - $5/walk-ins (resident)
- $6/walk-ins (non-resident)
- 12 punch passes are available for purchase. Cost: $50 Resident / $60 Non-Resident

name: Christ Community
description: Christ Community is a place to play pickleball in Youngsdale, IL. There are 3 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Dundee Township Park District - Rakow Center
description: Dundee Township Park District - Rakow Center is a place to play pickleball in Carpentersville, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: FIELDHOUSE By The Fox
description:
The FIELDHOUSE is a self serve court facility.  We offer two courts that can be rented per the hour, providing a private/semi private experience. 

We offer court rentals, as well open pickleball play. 

We’re mostly a rental facility, however we are looking to finding a pro to coach basics and do private lessons. 

Ideal space to host league play, practice, or to host a personal/corporate party.
